Welcome to Mafia Game 236
Newbie Game 93


Story
1 year and 6 days after the fall of Nonexistent Angels Incorporated...

HE NEEDS SOME MILK! came the declarative shout from Aisle 7 in an Average American SupermarketTM.

HannahW and mathjay looked at each other.

Let’s go, said mathjay immediately.
Let’s not, groaned HannahW, but she nevertheless grudgingly followed the mathjay who was bounding away straight in the direction of chaos.

When they arrived on the scene, they saw a poor, harried supermarket employee trying to comfort a mother who was practically in tears. JUST LOOK AT THIS. LOOK! she cried, pointing despairingly at the refrigerators behind her.

mathjay and HannahW looked. And they stared.

Row after row after row of cartons of milk. Bottles of milk. Cans of milk. Plastic bags of milk. Decked out in cartoony illustrations of bright red barns and green grass and happy, black and white cows giving a big thumbs up. Organic milk, grass fed milk, milk fortified with vitamin A, B, C, and D. Milk Made in the USA, fancy milk imported in refrigerated airplanes from Switzerland, milk that was probably frozen from 5 years ago. Whole milk, no fat milk, some fat milk, skim milk, reduced fat milk, baby milk, creamed milk, and half and half, all coming in a couple dozen different variations in different brands proudly claiming to be the Best Milk EverTM.

I can’t choose, wailed the mom, sinking onto the floor dramatically. There are too many options! There’s too much variety! My brain has ground to a halt, my wallet is yelling at me, and my baby darling boy needs some milk! Oh, I think I’m gonna faint. And she did.

There was silence as everyone stared at the poor sap who just wanted a nice carton of milk and was instead attacked by an overabundance of choice.

Wait, I know what to do! cried mathjay, wings rustling in excitement. He was practically bouncing into the air, which either meant he had a terrible idea or a god-awful one.
Oh no, said HannahW, who knew this very well.
We create the greatest brand of milk to ever exist, he continued.
No.
We establish a brand, ruthlessly stamp out competition, and shovel money into our advertising budget...
mathjay, no, HannahW protested. We are not doing that.
...and then we monopolize the market and take the choice away from consumers. That way, everyone is happy! mathjay cheered.
That sounds like an egregious idea, said HannahW, deciding that now was not the time to mince words.

mathjay just grinned in response. Great. Amazing. I’m glad you agree. Now be right back, I gotta make a deal with the devils for a couple billion dollars in funding.


- Important Rules -
This tab summarizes the most important rules.

For experienced players: this is the only tab you need to read.
For new players: if you have time, familiarizing yourself with the rest of the rules can be helpful.

Integrity
  • Do not edit or delete your posts, even for typos. Just post again.
  • Do not OOT (Out of Thread) and talk about this game outside your role PM, QTs, approved Discord channels, or this thread, even if you are dead. Access to the spectator chats will be granted upon request.
  • Do not gamethrow or intentionally sabotage your wincondition.
  • Do not attach files or link to external documents concerning this game. Discussions must stay in this thread.
  • Do not use OGI (Out of Game Information). Publicly discussed reads should be made exclusively from information in this thread or past completed games.

Activity
  • Each "day" is 2 weeks while each "night" is 3 days.
  • Do not post during night.
  • This game uses Dawn start; Day 1 will not start until everyone shows that they have read the rules.
  • All times will be in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable.
  • Activity rules are 48 hours to in-game prod and 72 hours to PM prod.

Voting
  • You must format your votes correctly. Capitalization doesn't matter, and capital i/lowercase L are not differentiated.
  • Majority hang is off for Day 1, but it is on starting Day 2.
  • Deadline hang is on from Day 1 but it is off for LYLO.
  • Votes are locked at LYLO.

Etiquette and Warnings
  • Use common sense.
  • Do not use formatting that makes text hard to read.
  • You may attack a player’s opinion, but do not make personal attacks on players themselves.
  • First-timers can receive up to 3 warnings before their next offense results in a force replacement or modkill. All other players can receive up to 2.
  • All other rules are standard. If you break a rule that isn't covered here, you may still be warned.

Setup and Moderators
  • This game is based on the Matrix6 setup.
  • Mafia have access to daychat.
  • All role mechanics and Night Action Resolutions are standard.
  • This game is moderated by HannahW and mathjay.
  • This game operates optional discord spectator and mafia private chats using the Unpaid Intern Central server. PM the mods to request access.

Resources and Support
  • For any issues, you may contacts us through your Role PM or through Discord (단건우형 ㅠㅠ#5081/a_tps_person#0298).
  • For a list of basic resources, please refer to the Resources tab below.
  • For an more extensive list of resources compiled by the UIMT, please go here.
  • If this game is causing you significant stress or frustration, feel free to use your role PM to talk or vent. We may not be allowed to give you technical advice, but we can listen or help you find a better way to process events. You may also contact us via Discord if you prefer; you can ask us about this in your role PM.
  • Congratulations, you made it through the summary tab! Make sure to send us a secret signal acknowledging you have seen this message in the thread by surreptitiously telling us what your favorite kind of cookie is!

  • General
    Credits to Binomial-theorem, chaotic_iak, willwang123, and fdas, among others, as well as the Mafia Universe forum rules, for the rule template.

    The following are standard mafia game rules.

    • Do not post during the night phase.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mods, including role PMs.
    • Do not talk about this game's events outside of this thread unless you are specifically given permission to do so by the moderators. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread. Referring to anything that has happened in an ongoing game, even if you do not say which game it is, is OOT.
    • Do not use any formatting that obscures or conceals text. This includes [color=#FFFFFF], [color=white], and [color=transparent].
    • Do not edit or delete posts, even for typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON.
    • If you are dead, do not post, and do not talk about this game anywhere else. You may still spectate, and access to the spoiled and unspoiled spectator chats will be offered.
    • Do not impersonate the mods.
    • Do not lie to the mods.
    • Do not abuse loopholes in the rules. Intent will be considered during rule enforcement.
    • You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications.

  • Votes and Hangs
    This tab covers voting, unvoting, No Hangs, and hangs.

    • Votes must be in this format: Vote: [player username] to be counted.
    • Usernames in votes must be spelled, but not necessarily capitalized, correctly. Do not use nicknames.
    • For the purposes of voting, I (capital i) and l (lowercase L) are considered identical.
    • For example, both Vote: mathjay and Vote: mAtHjAy are valid votes, but vote: mathjay, Vote: jay, Vote: mathjay., Vote:mathjay, Vote: mathjay, and Vote: mathjay are invalid.
    • Votes followed by extraneous punctuation that is bolded, even with separate bold tags, are invalid.
    • Votes in hide, tip, or quote tags do not count.
    • Vote to hang no one by posting Vote: No Hang.
    • Unvote by posting Unvote. You do not have to unvote before voting again.
    • Invalid votes will not count under any circumstances. Please consider notifying the mods in your role PM if you want to purposely fakevote.
    • Valid votes will always be counted unless they are clearly unintentional. There is no guarantee that an accidental vote will not be counted.
    • This game uses deadline hang: the player with the most votes at the EOD (End of Day) deadline will be hanged.
    • If two or more players have the same number of votes when the deadline is reached, the player who reached that number of votes first will be hanged. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • If no votes have been cast by the deadline, no one will be hanged.
    • Starting Day 2, if a player is voted by the majority of living players, then that player will be hanged immediately; and if No Hang is voted by half of living players, a No Hang will occur.
    • Upon reaching LYLO (Hang-or-Lose), votes will be locked, meaning that they cannot be changed.
    • Deadline hang is off at LYLO. If a majority hang is not reached by the deadline, the day will end without a hang, resulting in an automatic win for the mafia team.
    • The moment the deadline occurs, no further votes will be counted. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • If the deadline has passed or a hammer has occurred and the EOD has not been declared, the game will proceed into twilight. Players may still post, but no more votes or unvotes will be counted.
    • Once the moderators declare the EOD, the person hanged will be officially eliminated and their role revealed. Night will then immediately begin.
  • Activity
    This tab covers deadlines, activity rules, V/LAs, and replacements.

    • All times will be in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable, unless otherwise noted.
    • Each day phase will be 336 hours (14 days), and each night phase will be 72 hours (3 days).
    • The moderators may extend deadlines at their discretion.
    • If the moderators do not receive an NA submission from a player by the night deadline, the player will not perform a NA that night.
    • Night results will be sent after the night deadline.
    • Night will end when the moderators make a post declaring the end of night. You may not post in the thread until then, even if the night deadline has passed. Instead, PM the mods for updates in the case of a missed deadline.
    • Players who are temporarily unable to fulfill activity requirements can declare a V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence) by posting the V/LA dates in bold in-thread or in their role PM. Players on a V/LA will not be prodded.
    • V/LAs should be shorter than one week. For longer absences, contact the moderators for more options.
    • Players who no longer wish to or are unable to play in this game can request replacement by posting Request Replacement in-thread or in their role PM.
    • Players who have replaced out generally will not be allowed to replace back in.
    • Players will receive an in-game prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 48 hours and are not on V/LA. Details on "game-advancing post" are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • Players will receive a PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 72 hours and are not on V/LA.
    • Players will be replaced if they have not made a game-advancing post for 108 hours and are not on V/LA, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement.
    • If a player receives 4 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
    • If a player reaches replacement status more than once, they will be replaced.
    • Activity will be reset overnight. Players will not receive prods between twilight and daystart.
    • If you have access to a private topic, you may request that a partner be poked. The moderators will send a notification via PM to the specified player, but this will not count as an official prod.
    • If a player is postbanned by the AoPS Sheriff, they will be replaced. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
  • Integrity and Etiquette
    This tab covers integrity recommendations, player etiquette, warning limits, and examples of inconsiderate gameplay.

    • Do not gamethrow.
    • Do not discuss player alignments based on V/LAs, replacements, warnings, force replacements, modkills, and other interactions with moderators.
    • Any significant, game-related, and intentionally exclusive inter-player communication outside of moderator-sanctioned channels is prohibited.
    • Do not publicly reference OGI (Out of Game Information) in reads or create situations outside the thread that players could reasonably think as alignment indicative.

    The above rules are attempts to preserve the spirit of the game and should not affect most players. For specific details and examples, please click here.

    • Do not make personal attacks.
    • Do not spam.
    • Behavior that disrupts the game for players and makes it unreasonably hard for them to read and play may result in a warning.
    • Follow AoPS Community Guidelines.
    • Be mature and use common sense.
    • For minor rule infractions, first-timers can receive up to three warnings, while all other players can receive up to two. It is possible to receive multiple warnings for a single infraction.

    The above rules broadly cover most etiquette issues, but for specific details and examples of inconsiderate gameplay, please click here.

  • Moderation Policies
    This tab has been removed because we've already run out of space in the op.

  • Moderator Information
    This tab provides technical information about this game.

    • HannahW, mathjay, and Mathletesv are the moderators of Mafia Game 236.
    • ad333, Mathletesv, Scipio1, and Socoobo have contributed to flavor, OCRSTM, feedback, and the management of the private chat discord system.
    • This game uses the Unpaid Intern Central consolidated private chat system. Participants of this game will be granted access to the server as appropriate.
    • Red text is used for votecounts, warnings, and other announcements by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related text.
    • Blue text is used for activity checks, confirm counts, and other non-essential posts by the moderators.
    • Green text is used for town flavor-related text.
    • Custom shades of these colors may be used for aesthetic purposes.
    • Current custom shades are: Town flavor green (#00f752), Activity Check blue (#005dff), mathjay's blue (#4a86e8), HannahW's blue (#0b5394), Mathletesv's blue (#4d94ff), Scipio1's blue (#3d70ff), Socoobo's orange (#ff8000).
    • The Not Voting section should be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
    • If an error in the votecount is not pointed out within 2 days or by the next EOD, whichever is sooner, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • The moderators may change the rules at any time. Major rule changes will be announced at the bottom of the OP. All changes will also be noted in the modlog and OCRSTM Version History.
    • Players will not be retroactively penalized for violating new rules.
    • Major changes to the OP may be made in between games. The most important changes will be noted in OCRSTM Version History.
    • The moderators pledge to treat players fairly and keep moderator interventions to a minimum; however, we reserve the right to make the final judgement in the moderation of this game.

    MG236 OP is based on Overcomplicated RulesetTM (OCRSTM) version 8.
    Current version: 8.6
    Version History
Setup
This game is based on the Matrix6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Before the game starts, the setup will be randomly chosen from 6 possible role combinations:
  • Setup 1: 1 Town Jailkeeper, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
  • Setup 2: 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
  • Setup 3: 1 Town Tracker, 1 1-shot Bulletproof Townie, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
  • Setup 4/A: 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-shot Bulletproof Townie, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
  • Setup 5/B: 1 Town Cop, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
  • Setup 6/C: 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
There are a couple other setup mechanics that should be clarified:
  • This game is Dawn start. Once all the players confirm, Dawn will end, Day 1 will start, and the EOD deadline will be 14 days from then.
  • Doctors cannot protect themselves two nights in a row.
  • A Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town Jailkeeper's action.
  • A Mafia Roleblocker can kill and roleblock on the same night.
  • Cop results are sane.
  • Mafia have daychat.
Role PMs
Milk Influencer (Vanilla Townie) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are a Milk Influencer (Vanilla Townie). You were invited to iC miLKTM’s launch gala at their bottling plant somewhere in “Wyoming” which made you raise your eyebrows because everyone knows Wyoming doesn’t really exist. Still, the party sounded too good to pass up, so you put on your fancy clothes and hopped on the first shuttle iC miLKTM had chartered. You were looking forward to some good food, the odd photo op, maybe even some fun. You did not expect this entire hostage taking snafu but hey, you can lifestream all of it. It’s basically reality tv, but more fun, yea? Maybe you’ll even get some new followers out of this!

Your power lies in your observation skills, your voice, and your vote.

You win when all Mafia are killed, so your goal is to find them. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

Click here to go to the game thread.
Bottle Hacks Person (Town Doctor) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are the Bottle Hacks Person (Town Doctor). You run a BinstaTM account where you turn bottles into everything other than bottles, cuz reusing them as plant pots is so 10 years ago. Why not make a hat? Or a fork, or socks, or a byePhoneTM case, or a yoga mat? So many possibilities, it’s so exciting! And now, you’re in a milk factory. With a ton of empty bottles. And two beverage baddies on the loose. It’s perfect. Things You Didn’t Know You Could Make With Bottles, Milk Shooting Edition! (Not clickbait!)

Every night, you may PM the mods the name of a player. You will then put a DIY bottle shield in front of them and protect them for the night, preventing them from dying. (It’ll fall apart the next morning though.) You can save yourself, but you cannot do this two nights in a row.

You win when all Mafia are killed, so your goal is to find them. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

Click here to go to the game thread.
Milk Factory Janitor (Town Tracker) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are the Milk Factory Janitor (Town Tracker). You’re fresh out of college, and broke, and also the heckin president you voted for didn’t cancel your student loan debts like he promised. So you kinda just took the first job that you got a call back from, and bam, you’re here. But it’s okay, it’s not that bad! Passing the hours by using your engineering degree to figure out the fastest, bestest, most optimal-est way to mop the floors is, uh. It’s interesting! It’s a new experience! And look, everyone’s playing a game now! Maybe if you win, you’ll get a prize?

Every night, you may PM the mods the name of a player. You will then meticulously mop the floor around them so that they leave behind a trail of footprints if they visit anyone during the night. This way, you will be able to track that player and figure out who they targeted with their night action, if any, that night. You will be informed if your action was prevented from resolving.

You win when all Mafia are killed, so your goal is to find them. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

Click here to go to the game thread.
Fitness Model (Town Jailkeeper) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are the Fitness Model (Town Jailkeeper). Your deepest, darkest secret is that you’re slightly glad that the party was crashed - so spectacularly, and on national news, no less! - because you were getting pretty tired of just watching while everyone else knocked back like a billion cocktails and cookies and cupcakes and fancy looking FrenchTM desserts and pizza and... Ahem. Waistline. Anyways. Earlier, you found an empty vat kind of thing. Plenty big enough to stash someone in for the night. Which is perfect! You can’t kill someone or be killed if you’re in a milk vat! And of course, it’s not like they’ll asphyviate... aslixiate... asmixigate? Whatever, it’s a brilliant plan, and it's mighty fortunate that you’re more than strong enough for the odd (good!) kidnapping or two. Let’s just hope your target’s a heavy sleeper.

Every night, you may PM the mods the name of a player. You will then hide them in an empty milk vat for the night, protecting them from all night actions while also preventing them from performing their own night actions, if any. You cannot target yourself with this ability because then you’d be trapped in that milk vat.

You win when all Mafia are killed, so your goal is to find them. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

Click here to go to the game thread.
iC Speculator (Town Cop) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are the iC Speculator (Town Cop). Ever since iC miLKTM came out, you’ve been trying to figure out what the “iC” stands for. You’ve scoured through their website, even going through the HTML code for any leaks. You’ve pored through their interviews, their press release documents in multiple languages, and even tried to see if anyone had any insider leaks, but all to no avail. You’re no closer to the answer than you were 26 days ago. What does it even stand for? Incredibly CreamyTM? Indelibly CalciumatedTM? Intelligent CowsTM? Gah. Whatever it is, your investigation skills have certainly increased by an extreme degree through the entire ordeal, and you’re practically a private investigator now. Good thing you managed to nab an invite to the launch gala, because how else would everyone win this game without you?

Every night, you may PM the mods the name of a player. You will then investigate them and will be informed of their alignment. You will be informed if your action was prevented from resolving.

You win when all Mafia are killed, so your goal is to find them. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

That One Lactose Intolerant Friend (1-shot Bulletproof Townie) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are That One Lactose Intolerant Friend (1-shot Bulletproof Townie).

You’re lactose intolerant. You don’t want anything to do with this entire mess, you don’t really know why you’re here, and you’re just gonna sit in a corner and not bother anyone. Goodbye.

You will survive a single night kill attempt by the mafia because you’re way further away than they expect you to be, but if you are shot again after that you will be killed. You are not immune to the daily hang, your ability cannot be roleblocked, and you do not know if or when you are shot.

You win when all Mafia are killed, so your goal is to find them. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

Pawn of Corporate Warfare (Mafia Goon) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are a Pawn of Corporate Warfare (Mafia Goon). You honestly have no idea what’s happening, or how you ended up here, but your boss told you that their boss told them that their boss told them to tell your boss to tell you that their boss was told by their boss to tell you to do this. Whatever this was. They gave you a list of instructions, although... killing people? You certainly hope it’s not literally, because if this gets on your resume, you will be very sad. On second thought, maybe you’ll be able to get a job in a Supervillain OrganizationTM. That’d be pretty cool.

Your partner is [player] ([role]), and you may discuss with them in this QuickTopic while you are alive. The two of you will be able to choose a player to kill each night, as well as decide who makes the kill.

You win when the Mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent this, so your goal is to stay hidden and kill Town. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

Opposition Researcher (Mafia Roleblocker) wrote:


Hello, [player]!

You are the Opposition Researcher (Mafia Roleblocker). And you’re really not happy. It was a mistake to take this job without looking into who exactly was hiring you, and it was definitely a mistake to come to this gala. “You deserve a reward,” they said. “It’ll be fun,” they said. And you took the bait like a gullible fool and now, they’re forcing your hand with an ultimatum. You have the keys, so you could just leave, and get your identity and job exposed on national news, and you’d never be able to get hired anywhere except, like, customer service, or god forbid, marketing. Or, you could play along with this little game, win it, and hope to escape unnoticed among the commotion. You’d probably just get backstabbed anyway, but there’s a chance you’d be able to get away with it. Human hope is a horrible thing.

Every night, you may PM the mods the name of a player. You will then analyze their weaknesses and figure how to most efficiently tie them up overnight, roleblocking that person for that night and preventing their night actions, if any, from resolving. Your action takes precedence over the Jailkeeper, if applicable.

Your partner is [player] ([role]), and you may discuss with them in this QuickTopic while you are alive. The two of you will be able to choose a player to kill each night, as well as decide who makes the kill. You can simultaneously perform both the factional kill and your roleblock.

You win when the Mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent this, so your goal is to stay hidden and kill Town. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

[hide=Story]
[i]1 year and 6 days after [url=https://aops.com/community/p16333033]the fall of Nonexistent Angels Incorporated[/url]...[/i]

[b]HE NEEDS SOME MILK![/b] came the declarative shout from Aisle 7 in an Average American Supermarket[sup]TM[/sup]. 

HannahW and mathjay looked at each other. 

[b]Let’s go,[/b] said mathjay immediately. 
[b]Let’s not,[/b] groaned HannahW, but she nevertheless grudgingly followed the mathjay who was bounding away straight in the direction of chaos. 

When they arrived on the scene, they saw a poor, harried supermarket employee trying to comfort a mother who was practically in tears. [b]JUST LOOK AT THIS. LOOK![/b] she cried, pointing despairingly at the refrigerators behind her. 

mathjay and HannahW looked. And they stared. 

Row after row after row of cartons of milk. Bottles of milk. Cans of milk. [i]Plastic bags[/i] of milk. Decked out in cartoony illustrations of bright red barns and green grass and happy, black and white cows giving a big thumbs up. Organic milk, grass fed milk, milk fortified with vitamin A, B, C, and D. Milk Made in the USA, fancy milk imported in refrigerated airplanes from Switzerland, milk that was probably frozen from 5 years ago. Whole milk, no fat milk, some fat milk, skim milk, reduced fat milk, baby milk, creamed milk, and half and half, all coming in a couple dozen different variations in different brands proudly claiming to be the Best Milk Ever[sup]TM[/sup]. 

[b]I can’t choose,[/b] wailed the mom, sinking onto the floor dramatically. [b]There are too many options! There’s too much variety! My brain has ground to a halt, my wallet is yelling at me, and my baby darling boy needs some milk! Oh, I think I’m gonna faint.[/b] And she did. 

There was silence as everyone stared at the poor sap who just wanted a nice carton of milk and was instead attacked by an overabundance of choice. 

[b]Wait, I know what to do![/b] cried mathjay, wings rustling in excitement. He was practically bouncing into the air, which either meant he had a terrible idea or a god-awful one. 
[b]Oh no,[/b] said HannahW, who knew this very well. 
[b]We create the greatest brand of milk to ever exist,[/b] he continued. 
[b]No.[/b]
[b]We establish a brand, ruthlessly stamp out competition, and shovel money into our advertising budget...[/b]
[b]mathjay, no,[/b] HannahW protested. [b]We are [i]not[/i] doing that.[/b]
[b]...and then we monopolize the market and take the choice away from consumers. That way, everyone is happy![/b] mathjay cheered. 
[b]That sounds like an egregious idea,[/b] said HannahW, deciding that now was not the time to mince words. 

mathjay just grinned in response. [b]Great. Amazing. I’m glad you agree. Now be right back, I gotta make a deal with the devils for a couple billion dollars in funding.[/b]
[/hide]

[hide=- Important Rules -]
[b]This tab summarizes the most important rules.[/b]

[b]For experienced players:[/b] this is the only tab you need to read. 
[b]For new players:[/b] if you have time, familiarizing yourself with the rest of the rules can be helpful. 

[b]Integrity[/b]
[list][*][b]Do not edit or delete[/b] your posts, even for typos. Just post again. 
[*][b]Do not OOT (Out of Thread)[/b] and talk about this game outside your role PM, QTs, approved Discord channels, or this thread, even if you are dead. Access to the spectator chats will be granted upon request. 
[*][b]Do not gamethrow[/b] or intentionally sabotage your wincondition. 
[*][b]Do not attach files[/b] or link to external documents concerning this game. Discussions must stay in this thread.
[*][b]Do not use OGI[/b] (Out of Game Information). Publicly discussed reads should be made exclusively from information in this thread or past completed games. [/list]

[b]Activity[/b]
[list][*]Each [b]"day" is 2 weeks[/b] while each [b]"night" is 3 days[/b].
[*][b]Do not post during night.[/b]
[*]This game uses [b]Dawn start;[/b] Day 1 will not start until everyone shows that they have read the rules. 
[*]All [b]times[/b] will be in [b]Eastern Standard Time[/b] (EST, UTC-5) or [b]Eastern Daylight Time[/b] (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable. 
[*]Activity rules are [b]48 hours to in-game prod[/b] and [b]72 hours to PM prod.[/b][/list]

[b]Voting[/b]
[list][*]You [b]must format your votes correctly.[/b] Capitalization doesn't matter, and capital i/lowercase L are not differentiated. 
[*][b]Majority hang is off[/b] for Day 1, but it is [b]on[/b] starting Day 2.
[*][b]Deadline hang is on[/b] from Day 1 but it is [b]off[/b] for LYLO. 
[*]Votes are [b]locked at LYLO.[/b][/list]

[b]Etiquette and Warnings[/b]

[list][*][b]Use common sense.[/b] 
[*]Do not use formatting that makes text [b]hard to read.[/b]
[*]You may attack a player’s opinion, but [b]do not make personal attacks[/b] on players themselves. 
[*]First-timers can receive up to [b]3 warnings[/b] before their next offense results in a force replacement or modkill. [b]All other players can receive up to 2. [/b]
[*][b]All other rules are standard.[/b] If you break a rule that isn't covered here, you may still be warned.[/list] 

[b]Setup and Moderators[/b]

[list][*]This game is based on the [b]Matrix6 setup. [/b]
[*]Mafia have access to [b]daychat[/b]. 
[*]All role mechanics and Night Action Resolutions are [b]standard. [/b]
[*]This game is moderated by HannahW and mathjay. 
[*]This game operates optional discord spectator and mafia private chats using the Unpaid Intern Central server. PM the mods to request access.[/list]

[b]Resources and Support[/b]

[list][*]For any issues, you may contacts us through your Role PM or through Discord (단건우형 ㅠㅠ#5081/a_tps_person#0298). 
[*]For a list of basic resources, please refer to the Resources tab below. 
[*]For an more extensive list of resources compiled by the UIMT, please go [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c1980342h2517106_important_resources]here[/url].
[*]If this game is causing you significant stress or frustration, feel free to use your role PM to talk or vent. We may not be allowed to give you technical advice, but we can listen or help you find a better way to process events. You may also contact us via Discord if you prefer; you can ask us about this in your role PM. 
[*]Congratulations, you made it through the summary tab! Make sure to send us a secret signal acknowledging you have seen this message in the thread by surreptitiously telling us what your favorite kind of cookie is! [/list][/hide]

[list][*][hide=General]
[i]Credits to [url=http://bit.ly/fbith]Binomial-theorem[/url], [url=http://bit.ly/rmchao]chaotic_iak[/url], [url=http://bit.ly/rmww123]willwang123[/url], and [url=http://bit.ly/ffdas]fdas[/url], among others, as well as the [url=http://bit.ly/MUnFR]Mafia Universe forum rules[/url], for the rule template.[/i]

[b]The following are standard mafia game rules.[/b]


[list][*]Do not post during the night phase.
[*]Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mods, including role PMs.
[*]Do not talk about this game's events outside of this thread unless you are specifically given permission to do so by the moderators. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab. 
[*]Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread. Referring to anything that has happened in an ongoing game, even if you do not say which game it is, is OOT.
[*]Do not use any formatting that obscures or conceals text. This includes [verbatim][color=#FFFFFF], [color=white], and [color=transparent][/verbatim]. 
[*]Do not edit or delete posts, even for typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON. 
[*]If you are dead, do not post, and do not talk about this game anywhere else. You may still spectate, and access to the spoiled and unspoiled spectator chats will be offered. 
[*]Do not impersonate the mods. 
[*]Do not lie to the mods. 
[*]Do not abuse loopholes in the rules. Intent will be considered during rule enforcement. 
[*]You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications.[/list][/hide]

[*][hide=Votes and Hangs]
[b]This tab covers voting, unvoting, No Hangs, and hangs.[/b]


[list][*]Votes must be in this format: [b]Vote: [player username][/b] to be counted.
[*]Usernames in votes must be spelled, but not necessarily capitalized, correctly. Do not use nicknames. 
[*]For the purposes of voting, I (capital i) and l (lowercase L) are considered identical. 
[*]For example, both [b]Vote: mathjay[/b] and [b]Vote: mAtHjAy[/b] are valid votes, but [b]vote: mathjay[/b], [b]Vote: jay[/b], [b]Vote: mathjay.[/b], [b]Vote:mathjay[/b], Vote: [b]mathjay[/b], and [b][i]Vote: mathjay[/i][/b] are invalid. 
[*]Votes followed by extraneous punctuation that is bolded, even with separate bold tags, are invalid. 
[*]Votes in hide, tip, or quote tags do not count.
[*]Vote to hang no one by posting [b]Vote: No Hang[/b].
[*]Unvote by posting [b]Unvote[/b]. You do not have to unvote before voting again. 
[*]Invalid votes will not count under any circumstances. Please consider notifying the mods in your role PM if you want to purposely fakevote.
[*]Valid votes will always be counted unless they are clearly unintentional. There is no guarantee that an accidental vote will not be counted.
[*]This game uses deadline hang: the player with the most votes at the EOD (End of Day) deadline will be hanged. 
[*]If two or more players have the same number of votes when the deadline is reached, the player who reached that number of votes first will be hanged. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab. 
[*]If no votes have been cast by the deadline, no one will be hanged. 
[*]Starting Day 2, if a player is voted by the majority of living players, then that player will be hanged immediately; and if No Hang is voted by half of living players, a No Hang will occur.
[*]Upon reaching LYLO (Hang-or-Lose), votes will be locked, meaning that they cannot be changed.
[*]Deadline hang is off at LYLO. If a majority hang is not reached by the deadline, the day will end without a hang, resulting in an automatic win for the mafia team. 
[*]The moment the deadline occurs, no further votes will be counted. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab. 
[*]If the deadline has passed or a hammer has occurred and the EOD has not been declared, the game will proceed into twilight. Players may still post, but no more votes or unvotes will be counted.
[*]Once the moderators declare the EOD, the person hanged will be officially eliminated and their role revealed. Night will then immediately begin.[/list][/hide]
[*][hide=Activity]
[b]This tab covers deadlines, activity rules, V/LAs, and replacements.[/b]


[list][*]All times will be in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable, unless otherwise noted.
[*]Each day phase will be 336 hours (14 days), and each night phase will be 72 hours (3 days). 
[*]The moderators may extend deadlines at their discretion.
[*]If the moderators do not receive an NA submission from a player by the night deadline, the player will not perform a NA that night.
[*]Night results will be sent after the night deadline.
[*]Night will end when the moderators make a post declaring the end of night. You may not post in the thread until then, even if the night deadline has passed. Instead, PM the mods for updates in the case of a missed deadline. 
[*]Players who are temporarily unable to fulfill activity requirements can declare a V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence) by posting the V/LA dates in [b]bold[/b] in-thread or in their role PM. Players on a V/LA will not be prodded. 
[*]V/LAs should be shorter than one week. For longer absences, contact the moderators for more options. 
[*]Players who no longer wish to or are unable to play in this game can request replacement by posting [b]Request Replacement[/b] in-thread or in their role PM. 
[*]Players who have replaced out generally will not be allowed to replace back in. 
[*]Players will receive an in-game prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 48 hours and are not on V/LA. Details on "game-advancing post" are in the Moderation Policies tab.
[*]Players will receive a PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 72 hours and are not on V/LA. 
[*]Players will be replaced if they have not made a game-advancing post for 108 hours and are not on V/LA, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement. 
[*]If a player receives 4 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
[*]If a player reaches replacement status more than once, they will be replaced.
[*]Activity will be reset overnight. Players will not receive prods between twilight and daystart. 
[*]If you have access to a private topic, you may request that a partner be poked. The moderators will send a notification via PM to the specified player, but this will not count as an official prod.
[*]If a player is postbanned by the AoPS Sheriff, they will be replaced. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.[list][/hide]
[*][hide=Integrity and Etiquette]
[b]This tab covers integrity recommendations, player etiquette, warning limits, and examples of inconsiderate gameplay.[/b]


[list][*]Do not gamethrow. 
[*]Do not discuss player alignments based on V/LAs, replacements, warnings, force replacements, modkills, and other interactions with moderators. 
[*]Any significant, game-related, and intentionally exclusive inter-player communication outside of moderator-sanctioned channels is prohibited.
[*]Do not publicly reference OGI (Out of Game Information) in reads or create situations outside the thread that players could reasonably think as alignment indicative. [/list]

The above rules are attempts to preserve the spirit of the game and should not affect most players. For specific details and examples, [url=https://aops.com/community/p21335214]please click here.[/url]


[list][*]Do not make personal attacks.
[*]Do not spam. 
[*]Behavior that disrupts the game for players and makes it unreasonably hard for them to read and play may result in a warning. 
[*]Follow AoPS Community Guidelines. 
[*]Be mature and use common sense. 
[*]For minor rule infractions, first-timers can receive up to three warnings, while all other players can receive up to two. It is possible to receive multiple warnings for a single infraction.[/list]

The above rules broadly cover most etiquette issues, but for specific details and examples of inconsiderate gameplay, [url=https://aops.com/community/p21335246]please click here.[/url][/hide]

[hide=Setup]This game is based on the [url=http://bit.ly/m6msw]Matrix6[/url] setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Before the game starts, the setup will be randomly chosen from 6 possible role combinations:
[list][*][b]Setup 1:[/b] 1 Town Jailkeeper, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
[*][b]Setup 2:[/b] 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
[*][b]Setup 3:[/b] 1 Town Tracker, 1 1-shot Bulletproof Townie, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
[*][b]Setup 4/A:[/b] 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-shot Bulletproof Townie, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
[*][b]Setup 5/B:[/b] 1 Town Cop, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
[*][b]Setup 6/C:[/b] 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons[/list]
There are a couple other setup mechanics that should be clarified: 
[list][*]This game is Dawn start. Once all the players confirm, Dawn will end, Day 1 will start, and the EOD deadline will be 14 days from then. 
[*]Doctors cannot protect themselves two nights in a row.
[*]A Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town Jailkeeper's action.
[*]A Mafia Roleblocker can kill and roleblock on the same night.
[*]Cop results are sane.
[*]Mafia have daychat.[/list]

Hello, [player]!

You are the [color=red]Opposition Researcher (Mafia Roleblocker)[/color]. And you’re really not happy. It was a mistake to take this job without looking into who exactly was hiring you, and it was definitely a mistake to come to this gala. “You deserve a reward,” they said. “It’ll be fun,” they said. And you took the bait like a gullible fool and now, they’re forcing your hand with an ultimatum. You have the keys, so you could just leave, and get your identity and job exposed on national news, and you’d never be able to get hired anywhere except, like, customer service, or god forbid, marketing. Or, you could play along with this little game, win it, and hope to escape unnoticed among the commotion. You’d probably just get backstabbed anyway, but there’s a chance you’d be able to get away with it. Human hope is a horrible thing. 

Every night, you may PM the mods the name of a player. You will then analyze their weaknesses and figure how to most efficiently tie them up overnight, roleblocking that person for that night and preventing their night actions, if any, from resolving. Your action takes precedence over the Jailkeeper, if applicable. 

Your partner is [color=red][player] ([role])[/color], and you may discuss with them in [url=http://bit.ly/MafQT]this QuickTopic[/url] while you are alive. The two of you will be able to choose a player to kill each night, as well as decide who makes the kill. You can simultaneously perform both the factional kill and your roleblock. 

You win when the Mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent this, so your goal is to stay hidden and kill Town. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

post_rendered:
OP flavor
1 year and 6 days after the fall of Nonexistent Angels Incorporated...

HE NEEDS SOME MILK! came the declarative shout from Aisle 7 in an Average American SupermarketTM.

HannahW and mathjay looked at each other.

Let’s go, said mathjay immediately.
Let’s not, groaned HannahW, but she nevertheless grudgingly followed the mathjay who was bounding away straight in the direction of chaos.

When they arrived on the scene, they saw a poor, harried supermarket employee trying to comfort a mother who was practically in tears. JUST LOOK AT THIS. LOOK! she cried, pointing despairingly at the refrigerators behind her.

mathjay and HannahW looked. And they stared.

Row after row after row of cartons of milk. Bottles of milk. Cans of milk. Plastic bags of milk. Decked out in cartoony illustrations of bright red barns and green grass and happy, black and white cows giving a big thumbs up. Organic milk, grass fed milk, milk fortified with vitamin A, B, C, and D. Milk Made in the USA, fancy milk imported in refrigerated airplanes from Switzerland, milk that was probably frozen from 5 years ago. Whole milk, no fat milk, some fat milk, skim milk, reduced fat milk, baby milk, creamed milk, and half and half, all coming in a couple dozen different variations in different brands proudly claiming to be the Best Milk EverTM.

I can’t choose, wailed the mom, sinking onto the floor dramatically. There are too many options! There’s too much variety! My brain has ground to a halt, my wallet is yelling at me, and my baby darling boy needs some milk! Oh, I think I’m gonna faint. And she did.

There was silence as everyone stared at the poor sap who just wanted a nice carton of milk and was instead attacked by an overabundance of choice.

Wait, I know what to do! cried mathjay, wings rustling in excitement. He was practically bouncing into the air, which either meant he had a terrible idea or a god-awful one.
Oh no, said HannahW, who knew this very well.
We create the greatest brand of milk to ever exist, he continued.
No.
We establish a brand, ruthlessly stamp out competition, and shovel money into our advertising budget...
mathjay, no, HannahW protested. We are not doing that.
...and then we monopolize the market and take the choice away from consumers. That way, everyone is happy! mathjay cheered.
That sounds like an egregious idea, said HannahW, deciding that now was not the time to mince words.

mathjay just grinned in response. Great. Amazing. I’m glad you agree. Now be right back, I gotta make a deal with the devils for a couple billion dollars in funding.

post_rendered:
Dawnstart flavor
26 days later...

Now you see milk.
Now you don’t.
iC miLKTM

That’s awful, said HannahW.
It’s amazing, breathed mathjay, eyes sparkling. We’re putting this splat bang in the middle of Times Square.
HannahW frowned at him. You’re going to spend... she checks her tablet. 3 million dollars per month to put a really bad pun in Times Square? She sighed.
I mean, it’s working so far! said mathjay.
Yes. I can’t believe it’s working, sighed Hannah again.

They were promptly interrupted by a horde of newly minted milk executives in pinstriped suits, crowding through the door in their shiny dress shoes.

We have a situation, announced the Directing of Public Relations, Marketing, and All Things Smart. Do you want the good news, the bad news, or the truly awful news first? he asked, tapping on his ever-present tablet impatiently.
Tell us the most relevant and pertinent information first, replied HannahW.
The Director nods. The good news is, the first shuttle headed to our Wyoming facility for the gala arrived early, and a couple of influencers have already started livestreaming on BinstaTM.
Oh, that’s great! mathjay said, grinning. What’s the bad news then?
The bad news is that they arrived early and are streaming live, replied the Director without missing a beat.
Okay...? said mathjay, looking confused. What’s the truly awful news?
Oh. That, the Director said, looking a tad bit cross. Someone hijacked the factory and is threatening to kill everyone inside.

* * * * *

The recording showed the sterile, white production floor of a factory. Part of a massive bottling machine was visible at the edges of the video, and as the camera swung around, the suite of offices overlooking the room could be seen through the glass windows on the second floor. A voice started to speak, distorted and crackling through the facility’s PA system.

The doors are locked. Don’t bother trying to open them.

Don’t bother calling the cops either. They can’t help you. One wrong move, and this building goes down.

It’s nothing personal. You were just in the wrong place, at the wrong time. Our real target is the owner of this factory, and the disgusting lies they are telling.

So let’s make this more fun. Why don’t we play a game?

There are nine people in this room.

Two of them are the ones that locked you in. They know the code that will open the doors. If you find them, you can leave. But there’s a catch.

You get one guess every day. If you guess right, you’re one step closer to winning. And if you guess wrong... well, whoever you accuse gets to die. It’s a dangerous little game, but if you win, you’ll get to walk out of this factory. Alive.

Doesn’t it sound so fun? Better than sitting around as a hostage, waiting to be saved by a corporation that doesn’t care about you. I’ll even let you choose.

To play, or not to play. That is the question you’ll have to answer soon.

I’ll be back.

The PA broadcast stopped with a crackle, and the camera began to shake violently. People start to shout, talking over each other and getting louder and louder.

Ah, said mathjay.
Ah, said HannahW.
Yes, said the Director. I believe we’re doomed.
Nahhhh, said mathjay quickly, flapping his hands. Our first shipments have already reached stores, and we can just reroute the milk tankers to our other facility in the middle of nowhere, Kansas something something. As for the hostage situation, well... I’m sure they’ll think of something. Everything will be okay!

Narrator: Everything was not okay.

Since no one has posted a copy-pasta yet, and I don't have one ready, here's a bit on scumhunting that I'm typing up on the spot.

1. Always ask yourself why someone did something. Don't be satisfied with one explanation, try and figure out all likely explanations before deciding if something is scummy or not.
2. Something is scummy if you think it came from scum.
3. Scum normally pushes their wincon, so if you find the most likely explanation for some of their actions to be something that seems to be scum-motivated, then that is scummy.

Yea, that's all, I'm not great at explanaing stuff.

post_rendered:
Oh, and one more thing about finding scum.

You don't just scumhunt this game, but you also townhunt.

Once you correctly identify a certain number of townies (depending on town:scum ratio), you can use PoE (process of elimination) and hang everyone else. If your PoE (in mafia we use PoE to describe your pool of non-towncore people) is correct, then it doesn't matter if you mishang, since you'll end up hitting scum eventually.

Oh, and towncore is just a group of people you're very confident are town.

post_rendered:
One last thing before I go.

Confirmed town/scum usually means that the person is 100% guaranteed to be scum, almost always because of mechanical reasons.

When I say mechanical, I mean things that are mod-confirmed, for example, a cop check on someone.

However, some people use it to say that they feel the person is very very very likely scum, and they just can't see otherwise. While the person is actually confirmed to be that alignment, the person making the read feels that that's the only alignment that person could be, so for them, they're essentially confirmed town/scum.

post_rendered:
A few hours later, the headlines were blaring.

iC miLK FACTORY SHUT DOWN AS HOSTAGE SITUATION THREATENS BIG BOOM! cried one.
HIJACKERS CLAIM INFORMATION ON DECEPTIVE PRACTICES FROM iC miLK! yelled another.
EXECUTIVES AT MILK STARTUP BOTTLED UP AT HQ AS REPORTERS TRY TO MILK THEM FOR MORE DETAILS ON THE CRISIS, declared a third.

The incident had made national news in 40 minutes flat. It had even hit the actual paper newspapers in under 3 hours as their crusty old journalists whacked at their typewriters and kicked the printing presses into working. Everything really was not fine.

mathjay groaned facedown on the table. We need to call the FBI, he mumbled.
They’re threatening to kill the hostages if we do that, HannahW pointed out.

The Director hummed from where he was leaning against the floor-to-floor windows. The office they were in was on one of the higher floors of a skyscraper in the middle of the city, and you could see the city's skyline, bright under the mid-morning sunshine. The other executives had left earlier, leaving the three alone.

You know, it’s not a bad suggestion, he said.
HannahW glared. The hostages will die, she repeated.
The Director just waves his hand. From a public relations standpoint, it’s an attractive option. It’s more than possible to defer the blame for whatever happens to the tactics of the police, or just focusing on the act of terrorism itself. Might require a well-placed bribe at a law enforcement agency or one viral article, but there’s more than enough money in the PR budget for that. It’s an extremely attractive option, in fact, if the company can gracefully exit this situation mostly intact.

By this point, HannahW was extremely disturbed.

Think about it, he said. I’m sure you’ve both guessed as to what they’re referring to as our “lies.”
Are you referring to our entire business of selling regular old milk at significantly higher prices through flashy packaging and an advertising blitz? HannahW asked drily.
mathjay just snorted. Crude. And an uncharitable take.
But you do have to admit, it’s effective counter-messaging. Imagine what’d happen if the exposé really does go through, the Director said.

Sales, said mathjay. Would go poof! He mimed an explosion with his hands.

A second later, he sat up straight, horrified. Wait, shoot. Sales would go poof. Gone. Donezo. Nuked.

Indeed they would, the Director agreed. I’ve looked into our finances, by the way — no, don’t look at me like that. Any sane person would double check if they got handed a 500 million dollar marketing budget for a line of milk that’s just launching globally out of nowhere. We have several billion dollars of funding funneled as “investments” through what I’m pretty sure are shell companies. I don’t know where you got it from, but —
I made a deal with the devil, muttered mathjay.
The Director just waved his hand. You don’t have to tell me. I won’t pry and frankly, it does not concern me. However, I surely hope you have some sort of insurance because if we don’t fix this problem, you’re going to lose all of it.

He pushed off the window, walking out of the room.

Best of luck, bosses, he said and disappeared out the door.

* * * * *

The production floor of the milk factory hummed with idling machinery. The area was a bit smaller than a football field, walls and floors a spotless white. The ceiling was two or three stories high, and neatly organized conveyer belts and pipes wove in between the machines. There were two main exits on either end of the room, large sliding doors made out of metal and secured electronically. There was also a smaller door on the side, which led up to the offices and control rooms on the second floor.

The hostages had tried all of them, but they were all locked.

The PA crackled back to life.

Excuse my disappearance. Have you made a decision? Will you play in the game?

From the nine hostages scattered around the room, there was a collective yes. Some of them shouted excitedly, while others sounded decidedly less enthusiastic.

Wonderful, the voice responded in a monotone. I’m glad you’ve made the right choice.

There was silence, and one of the hostages coughed pointedly.

Oh, by the way, since a game isn’t really fun until everyone knows the stakes, I’ve prepared a small demonstration. If you may turn your attention over there to the second floor offices...

There was a muffled cry and a thump as a middle-aged man wearing office-worker clothes was slammed against the glass window. A figure dressed all in black pointed a gun at him, their face hidden.

Here’s a small reminder that this is real.

Bang.

The glass cracked from the gunshot but it didn't break, and the man slumped to the ground, leaving a streak of red behind on the glass.

The voice over the PA laughs harshly.

Day 1 has started on July 21, 2021 - 19:00 EDT. Deadline is on August 4, 2021 - 19:00 EDT. Majority hang is off for Day 1.

post_rendered:
fifty51 wrote:
Quick question, with majority hang off on day 1 does that mean if someone gets like 4 votes and everyone else gets lower, there will be a no hang?
No.

So how it works is that there are 2 "modifiers".

1. Deadline Hang
2. Majority Hang

Only deadline hang: Whoever has the most votes by deadline dies.
Only majority hang: Whoever reaches majority first dies, if no one reaches majority, then no one dies.
Deadline + Majority: Whoever reaches majority first dies, if no one reaches majority, then the person with the most votes dies.

Today is only deadline, after that, it will be deadline + majority.

Only majority hang: Whoever reaches majority first dies, if no one reaches majority, then no one dies.
Deadline + Majority: Whoever reaches majority first dies, if no one reaches majority, then the person with the most votes dies.

Today is only deadline, after that, it will be deadline + majority.

post_rendered:
60, 59, 58...

Can you stop? I’m trying to think!

Why have we not decided yet? It’s so obvious.

Shut up!

31, 30, 29...

Wait, stop stop stop stop!

Go back, choose someone else!

WHERE ARE THEY?

10, 9, 8, 7...

God I hope we got it right...

...3, 2, and 1. Times up! And the results of the first ever milk murder mystery masquerade is out! Who will the unlucky winner be, I wonder?

* * * * *

...so they’re making us choose between bad publicity from people dying, or bad publicity from admitting that our milk is very ordinary, mused HannahW.
I mean, said the Director. It is a very tactically sound move on their part.
Indeed, agreed HannahW. As long as this game of theirs manages to proceed as is, our prospects look quite dim.

There was a low whine from the corner where mathjay was moping. I hate this.
You hate a lot of things, HannahW pointed out reasonably.
I hate this an extra lot. In fact, I hate it so much, I’ve decided that I am ignoring this problem, announced mathjay.

There’s a tiny bit of silence.

Oh wow, HannahW replied, voice utterly devoid of life. That is extremely surprising.
The Director snickered. Indeed.
I’m being serious, mathjay insisted. I’ve ignored my student loans and tax returns while I was alive. This is nothing in comparison.
HannahW frowned. Are you telling me I’ve been friends with someone who’s committed tax fraud.
The Director snickers harder. If there’s a bit of good news to be had, it’s that in my gratuitous foresight - here, HannahW grumbles quietly - I took the liberty of hiring a, uh, consultant. I believe it will make your lives a lot easier. In fact, he should be here soon.
HannahW squinted skeptically. You should stop enabling him. Do you mean “soon” or “soonTM”? she asked him, and the Director just waved his hand vaguely.

mathjay clapped his hands excitedly. Doesn’t matter. It’s amazing. Great. I love you so much.
I do not, the Director cut in smoothly.
I’m sure you guys can handle it better than I can, he continued.
That’s not saying much, though, HannahW pointed out.
LA LA LA I DIDN’T HEAR THAT I’LL JUST GO DROWN IN THE SORROWS OF ETERNAL FINANCIAL MISMANAGEMENT! yelled mathjay, summoning his wings and ripping a giant hole through the back of his shirt. He pressed a button on the wall, and a section of the floor-to-ceiling glass window began to slide open.

How did you even get that installed, by the way? the Director asked, absently.
mathjay just shrugged. Ask Hannah. She got it installed after the second time I crashed through the window.
The Director glanced at HannahW, who just shrugged. It was the more economically sound decision.
Valid, agreed the Director.

Then there was a knock on the door.
Ah, the Director said, smiling. There he is. Come in! he calls out, and the door opened.

mathjay’s eyes bugged out, and his wings flared out in surprise. MSV?! That’s all he managed to get out before the strong wind outside the building caught on his wings and yanked him out the window, screaming. AHHHHHH!

post_rendered:
Hi, benjaminsz said.

He was holding something that looked like an ancient cellphone and a violet keycard, and he looked tired. Everyone stared at him groggily from where they were curled up on the floor, each on their own little tarp, scavenged from the storage room. The lucky ones had also managed to snatch couch cushions from the employee lounge.

I concede the game, he said. When he got no response, he added on, slightly awkwardly, Like, I’m the last mafia.

The hostages just blinked at him blearily, some rubbing at their eyes.

He shrugged. I don’t know. They don’t pay me enough for this. All of this, whatever it was. So, uh. I surrender. Here’s the phone I got my orders from, and here’s the master keycard to the facility. It’s all I have. He held the phone and key out like he expected someone to take it from him, but when nobody did, he awkwardly put it on the floor. I, uh. You should probably give that to the police. They’re right outside the factory. There was also the murder robot that was supposed to kill all of you, but it’s gone now..

Silence.

I’ll be on the roof or something while you guys sort things out. I was looking out the window while you guys were still sleeping, and the sunrise looked beautiful. He smiled wryly. Wyoming may not exist, but it sure is pretty.

With that and a small wave, benjaminsz turned and walked deeper into the factory floor, disappearing behind the maze of pipes.

. . .

I’m going back to sleep, someone mumbled, and there was a murmur of agreement. And so they slept, just a bit more, as the world woke up to a new day.

* * * * *

Somewhere else on earth, in a Dark and OminousTM room...

There was a loud slam.

That could not have gone worse if I hired a sentient hamster to do a hitjob. Remind me, why do I pay you idiots again?

Someone mumbled a reply.

The first speaker barked out a laugh. Ha! That’s funny. You should really become a comedian or something. I bet you’d be homeless in 2 days flat!

Silence.

Really, though, I haven’t seen a disaster like this in ages, he said, chuckling. This is gonna be fun!

You thought it was over? Oh boy do I have news for you. We’re just getting started.

Just you wait.



To be continued . . .

End of Game Technical Post

Mafia QuickTopic
Spectator QuickTopic

MG236 operated a discord spectator chat through the UIC server.

Night actions
Night 1

math202 tracks fdas. They receive a no movement.
ostriches88 protects fdas.

The mafia did not submit a factional kill.


Bloopers from Flavor
That, breathed mathjay, as everyone stared at at the poster brought up on the screen, is some truly awful graphic design.

iC miLK is so bogus Enron would be ashamed, and you don’t even know who Enron were! the poster declared in brightly colored text. We’re debunking all their lies and dirty corporate marketing live on Binstagram so you can see them for the money-grabbing monsters that they are. Join us, or watch your favorite influencers die!

Amateur, the marketing director agreed with a sniff. With such poor communication skills, it’s a wonder if they manage to attract any attention at all.
Amateur or not.. Hannah shook her head, sighing, we need to fix this. Now ‒ this is the most relevant and pertinent information ‒ and that means now. Let me think… trailing off, she propped her head against her hand. Already hijacked and confirmed armed? That poster makes no sense… Join us… or watch them die? Does that mean… that means nothing. Either way...

Nah, it’ll be fine, mathjay said, waving a hand in the air dismissively. Just reroute the milk tankers to our other factory in the middle of nowhere so our supply chain isn’t interrupted. Where was it, Utah? Kansas? Wyoming? Something like that. We can wait for it to die down and quietly order an asssassination on whoever cooked this up after it’s over. Everything will be okay!

Narrator: Everything was not okay.

* * * * *

HannahW sat in the corner, staring intensely at a piece of paper. Hmmm.

Everything's going to be fine! mathjay cried in denial from the middle of the room.
Yes, the Director nodded. Giving the public exactly what they want, the key to good public relations.
All while doing absolutely nothing! mathjay continued loudly. Letting them pay exorbitant pricesTM for fancily advertised regular old milk in eternal ignorance!

This won't work, grumbled HannahW.
Yes it will, said mathjay.
No it won't, said HannahW.
YES IT WILL, said mathjay, extra stubbornly this time.

Surprisingly, he was right. For once. To some extent.

INSERT HEADLINE HERE, flashed the headlines half an hour later.

Oh, said HannahW.

* * * * *

Right, HannahW muttered skeptically. Picking up her pen, she scribbled something on her piece of paper and stood up. Speaking of sales and marketing, as Chief Financial Officer, I have the authority to adjust remuneration for any employee as deemed fit and I hereby declare-

ARGHHHHHHHHHHHHH WHAT THE HELL I-

* * * * *

HannahW's checklist of things to do post-catastrophe:
  • get a new spokesperson
  • get a new Director
  • get a new budget
  • get a new funding source
  • get mathjay out of debt
  • get a new line of legitimate products
  • get mathjay a new company
  • get a new job
  • get a new nongullible American population
After all, prevention is best.

Transparency Report
  • Accidentally sent MrVancoover’s role PM to NoSignOfTheta.

Both players were VTs and the error resulted because of an error in copy/pasting role PMs. All PMs were prewritten, but for some reason, the wrong role PM was copy/pasted when role PMs were sent out. As the error was caught relatively early in the game, the decision was made to completely rerand the game.
  • A reminder for the mafia factional kill was not sent N1.

The provision added in OCRSTM v. 4.1.1 guaranteeing a reminder to submit night actions halfway through the night was removed in OCRSTM v. 7.0. As a result, when the mafia factional kill was not submitted, a reminder was sent extremely late, resulting in the mafia not performing a factional kill. There was a potential oversight as one mafia member was hanged, while the other was on V/LA through EOD1 and EON1, however we do not believe this affected the outcome of the game as the late-submitted kill would have been blocked by the doctor. The night action reminder will be added back in the upcoming OCRSTM 9.
  • The Tracker result was not sent on time.

The N1 Track result of “No movement” was originally not sent until the Tracker asked about the result. The error was a simple oversight because the result was not a positive, although the Tracker should have received a response. The error may possibly have contributed to the Tracker mistakenly thinking that they were roleblocked, leading them to claim, and we apologize. However, it should be noted that a roleblocker cannot exist in a tracker setup.

Where was it, Utah? Kansas? Wyoming? Something like that. We can wait for it to die down and quietly order an asssassination on whoever cooked this up after it’s over. Everything will be okay![/b]

Narrator: Everything was not okay. 

[b]* * * * *[/b]

HannahW sat in the corner, staring intensely at a piece of paper. [b]Hmmm.[/b]

[b]Everything's going to be fine![/b] mathjay cried in denial from the middle of the room. 
[b]Yes,[/b] the Director nodded. [b]Giving the public exactly what they want, the key to good public relations.[/b]
[b]All while doing absolutely nothing![/b] mathjay continued loudly. [b]Letting them pay exorbitant prices[sup]TM[/sup] for fancily advertised regular old milk in eternal ignorance![/b]

[b]This won't work,[/b] grumbled HannahW.
[b]Yes it will,[/b] said mathjay.
[b]No it won't,[/b] said HannahW.
[b]YES IT WILL,[/b] said mathjay, extra stubbornly this time.

Surprisingly, he was right. For once. To some extent.

[b]INSERT HEADLINE HERE,[/b] flashed the headlines half an hour later.

[b]Oh,[/b] said HannahW.

[b]* * * * *[/b]

[b]Right,[/b] HannahW muttered skeptically. Picking up her pen, she scribbled something on her piece of paper and stood up. [b]Speaking of sales and marketing, as Chief Financial Officer, I have the authority to adjust remuneration for any employee as deemed fit and I hereby declare-[/b]

[b]ARGHHHHHHHHHHHHH WHAT THE HELL I-[/b]

[b]* * * * *[/b]

HannahW's checklist of things to do post-catastrophe:
[list][*]get a new spokesperson
[*]get a new Director
[*]get a new budget
[*]get a new funding source
[*]get mathjay out of debt
[*]get a new line of legitimate products
[*]get mathjay a new company
[*]get a new job
[*]get a new nongullible American population[/list]
After all, prevention is best. 
[/hide]
